name: rate-budget
description: A multi-key quota decision engine for RPM, TPM, and RPD-aware routing.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean.cjs && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.cjs
scripts.test: node scripts/clean.cjs && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.cjs && node --test test/*.test.mjs
